meta.title: Panel 3: Power Shifts in the Eastern Mediterranean:
meta.description:
1:35pm-2:45 pm
Panel 3: "The Energy Security Changes of the Eastern Mediterranean" 
Opening Remarks: Kenneth Weinstein 
Moderator: Dr. Seth Cropsey
Panelists:
Charles Ellinas 
Nicholas Karambelas 
 - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
